mapper.sql: id, tag_name, tag_color, sort, tenant_id, delete_flag, create_time
mapper.select:
select
from jsh_customer_tag where ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1'
and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
order by sort asc, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_customer_tag (id, tag_name, tag_color, sort, tenant_id, delete_flag, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tagName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tagColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into jsh_customer_tag
id,
tag_name,
tag_color,
sort,
tenant_id,
delete_flag,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tagName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tagColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update jsh_customer_tag
tag_name = #{tagName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tag_color = #{tagColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_customer_tag set tag_name = #{tagName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tag_color = #{tagColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_customer_tag set delete_flag = '1' where id in
#{id}
